title: Delhi Court Sends I-PAC Director Vinesh Chandel To 14-Day Judicial Custody
description: A Delhi court on Thursday sent I-PAC Director and Co-founder Vinesh Chandel to 14 days' judicial custody till May 7 in connection with a money laundering probe linked to the alleged coal pilferage case. Meanwhile, Vinesh Chandel has approached the Patiala House Court seeking regular bail.
